reason: Frontend layer spec for new service module and helper additions.
Project-Owned Trellis Execution Metadata contract (§3) — new code must not read repo.sddMode directly; @-mention dispatch must use projects-aware helpers.
Discriminated unions and exhaustive enum patterns for AtMention parser and interception result types.
Stable stores for invocation tracking — ensure dispatcher writes through repositoryMemberInvocationsStore where appropriate.
Composer → AppImpl handler → service dispatcher → TrellisWorkflowAdapter → claude invocation; verify the data flow is single-direction with no leaked state.
Reuse TrellisWorkflowAdapter instead of duplicating worktree+claude invocation logic.
